response.overview: “Reclaiming Indonesia” is reports of the on-going impunity in Indonesia. In 2012 to 2014, AJAR was actively involved in a civil society-based truth seeking initiated by Coallition of Justice & Truth (KKPK/Koalisi Keadilan & Pencarian Kebenaran). These reports tried to cover 40-year impunity in Indonesia, the patterns of violence that occured, and recommendation to break this cycle of violence.  This video, as part of the report, is a summary of public hearing heald in Jakarta, 2014.
response.title: Menemukan Kembali Indonesia
